message:
feat(tui): universal command palette with project/contact/reservation entities (br-3vwi.8.1)

Expand the command palette (Ctrl+P) to include all searchable entity types:
- Projects: from DB snapshot, top 30 by recency, deep-links to Projects screen
- Contacts: from DB snapshot, top 30, deep-links to Contacts screen with pair selection
- Reservations: from event stream, top 30 agents, deep-links to Reservations screen

Refactored build_palette_actions into three focused functions to stay under
clippy line limits. Fixed quick:project: dispatch to route to Projects screen
(was Dashboard). Added 5 new tests for palette entity dispatch + event extraction.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
